check_ros1_apis_python.description: Warn when ROS 1 APIs are used in Python files

check_ros1_apis_cpp.description: Warn when ROS 1 APIs are used in C++ files
check_ros1_apis_cpp.matcher: tool_name in ['Write', 'Edit', 'MultiEdit'] AND (tool_input.file_path matches '.*\.cpp$' OR tool_input.file_path matches '.*\.hpp$')

validate_urdf_on_save.description: Auto-validate URDF/XACRO on save (if check_urdf is available)
validate_urdf_on_save.matcher: tool_name in ['Write', 'Edit'] AND (tool_input.file_path matches '.*\.urdf$' OR tool_input.file_path matches '.*\.xacro$')

check_package_xml_deps.description: Check package.xml is updated when imports change in Python files
check_package_xml_deps.matcher: tool_name in ['Write', 'Edit'] AND tool_input.file_path matches '.*\.py$' AND tool_input.file_path matches '.*/my_.*_pkg/.*'

remind_source_workspace.description: Remind to source workspace after colcon build

hooks.command: echo '[ROS 2 Hook] After build completes: source install/setup.bash' >&2

check_blocking_calls.description: Warn about blocking calls in ROS callbacks
